reviews.review_title: Great way to learn about social work
reviews.review_description: This app presented really well what social work is about! And presented some science behind it. I highly recommend this to anyone who is thinking about career choises, want to work with people and to help them.

I am a graduate student working on my masters in social work and this game perfectly grasps the fundamental concepts that I learned while working on my bachelors in social work. I give this simulator four stars because after helping Jenna with her first day on the job, it left me wanting to play more levels which unfortunately this game does not have! I view this simulator as a fun interactive way to learn more about the demanding yet rewarding field of social work, and I think it can give people a better insight on what a behavioral health social worker goes through on a typical day. There's so much more I can say about this game but I would definitely recommend this simulator to a friend!
